title: A Farmer's Wedding Plan
article_text: A farmer named Tom wants to wed his girlfriend, but he needs a loan for the wedding. He has a reasonable plan to rent his land for a theme party. The atmosphere at his farm is largely peaceful and fresh. He believes the appearance of the farm will strongly attract guests. He must get a guarantee from a bank first. He thinks his judgment about this business is correct. The bank will approve his loan if he shows a good comparison of costs. He will work till the evening to finish his proposal. The definition of success for him is a happy marriage. He also wants protection for his family with insurance.

sentences.en: A farmer named Tom wants to wed his girlfriend, but he needs a loan for the wedding.
sentences.zh: 一位名叫汤姆的农民想与他的女朋友结婚，但他需要一笔贷款来办婚礼。

words.eng_def: a person who works on a farm

sentences.en: He has a reasonable plan to rent his land for a theme party.
sentences.zh: 他有一个合理的计划，出租他的土地来办主题派对。

sentences.en: The atmosphere at his farm is largely peaceful and fresh.
sentences.zh: 他农场的氛围大体上是宁静而清新的。

sentences.en: He believes the appearance of the farm will strongly attract guests.
sentences.zh: 他相信农场的外观会强烈吸引客人。

words.eng_def: with a lot of force or power

sentences.en: He must get a guarantee from a bank first.
sentences.zh: 他必须先得到银行的担保。

words.eng_def: used to say something is necessary
a promise that something will happen

sentences.en: He thinks his judgment about this business is correct.
sentences.zh: 他认为自己对这个生意的判断是正确的。

sentences.en: The bank will approve his loan if he shows a good comparison of costs.
sentences.zh: 如果他展示出良好的成本比较，银行就会批准他的贷款。

words.eng_def: the act of looking at differences

sentences.en: He will work till the evening to finish his proposal.
sentences.zh: 他会工作到晚上来完成他的提案。

sentences.en: The definition of success for him is a happy marriage.
sentences.zh: 对他来说，成功的定义是幸福的婚姻。

words.eng_def: the meaning of a word or idea

sentences.en: He also wants protection for his family with insurance.
sentences.zh: 他还想通过保险为家人提供保护。

words.eng_def: a promise to pay for loss or damage

vocabulary.example: He wants protection for his family.
He wants to wed his girlfriend.

vocabulary.eng_def: the meaning of a word or idea
vocabulary.example: The definition of success is clear.
